stemHtml: The following instructions are given by ATC: 'F-GTPO cross runway 18, taxi holding point B2, hold short runway 26'. What is the appropriate readback?

options.a: Taxi holding point B2, hold short runway 26, F-GTPO.
options.b: Cross runway 18, taxi holding point B2, hold short runway 26, F-GTPO.
options.c: Cross runway 18, hold short runway 26, F-GTPO.
options.d: F-GTPO cross runway 18, taxi holding point B2, hold short runway 26.
